# CPD Table

The following tables are used to track CPD fpor easier submission at year end

## 2026

The following section details my CPD over 2026

| Category  |  Description of Activity |  Start | End  | Learning Hours  | Benefit |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Self-directed
learning  | Setting up this document in github  | 15/03/2026  |  15/03/2026  |  1 | Given me an appreciation of quarto setup in Github which I am not very familiar. Quarto is becoming a popular reporting method in industry and I was keen to maintain records here to develop quorto and github knowledge independently  |
